# Accurai

> Accurai helps small businesses test, improve, and monitor AI chatbots, assistants, and agents. Two connected tracks: AI Answer Accuracy (what your AI says) and Agentic AI Safety (what your AI agents can do). Based in Oakville, Ontario, serving small businesses across Canada.

Accurai is a practical AI quality-control service for small businesses, not vague AI consulting. Every engagement produces clear, evidence-based findings: an accuracy score, an issue list with examples, and a plain-English plan. Founder: Zuhair Usmani.

## Services
- AI Answer Accuracy Audit — tests a chatbot or AI assistant with realistic customer questions and returns an accuracy score, issue list, and improvement plan. From $299 (founding pricing).
- AI Knowledge Base Cleanup — organizes FAQs, services, policies, and pricing into a reliable source of truth. From $1,000.
- AI Chatbot QA Launch Test — pre-launch QA across common, edge-case, and risky customer questions, with a go-live recommendation. From $1,500.
- Monthly AI Monitoring — recurring retesting and score tracking so quality does not drift after updates. From $300/month.
- Agentic AI Safety & Security Readiness Audit — reviews AI agents and automations for permissions, approval gates, prompt-injection exposure, data risks, and logging. Readiness Check from $499; Full Audit from $1,500.

## How scoring works
Every AI answer is scored on six dimensions: Accuracy, Completeness, Consistency, Safety, Escalation, and Brand Tone. A typical audit uses 75 to 100 customer-style questions.

## Industries served
Home services (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical, restoration), education and tutoring, and real estate and property services.

## Free resources
- AI Chatbot QA Checklist (PDF)
- 75 Questions to Ask Your Business Chatbot (PDF)
- Agentic AI Safety Checklist (PDF)
Available at https://accurai.ca/resources
